steps.title: Identify the core claim
steps.content: The team concluded Kozak & Keoleian's study had more specificity in data. The detail rating (measuring “reported data with more detail”) directly reflects data specificity.

steps.title: Find the direct contradiction
steps.content: A lower detail rating for Kozak & Keoleian (choice A) means their data is less detailed—directly contradicting “more specificity.” Traceability (B) concerns procedure clarity, not data specificity; C and D would support the original conclusion. That matches choice A — A is correct.
